text_original: They hace amazing team in I.T!.
text_zh: 他们在 IT 部门拥有一支了不起的团队！
reply_original: Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! Thank you so much for the shout-out to our I.T. department—they work incredibly hard to keep the magic running smoothly. Your support is the fuel that keeps us going. If you ever need help or have ideas, feel free to reach us at support@fantachat.ai. Thanks for being awesome!
reply_zh: 哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！非常感谢您对我们 IT 部门的称赞——他们为了保障系统的顺畅运行付出了巨大的努力。您的支持是激励我们不断前行的动力。如果您需要任何帮助或有任何想法，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们。感谢您的支持，您太棒了！
